identity.name: ILWU Local 4 Golf Tournament
identity.aesthetic: The 'Union Links' - A blend of bold union reliability and classic golf tradition. High contrast, sturdy typography, and vibrant outdoor colors.

primary.description: ILWU Navy Blue - Used for primary buttons, headers, and strong branding elements.

secondary.description: Union Yellow - Used for accents, highlights, and 'Join Team' calls to action. High energy.

accent.description: Fairway Green - Used for success states, golf-specific iconography, and decorative elements.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1a365d] text-white hover:bg-[#1a365d]/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide py-6 px-8
buttons.secondary: bg-[#f7dc00] text-[#1a365d] hover:bg-[#f7dc00]/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide py-6 px-8
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1a365d] text-[#1a365d] hover:bg-[#1a365d] hover:text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide py-6 px-8

cards.feature: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 p-8 flex flex-col gap-4
cards.highlight: bg-[#1a365d] text-white p-8 shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: h-12 bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-[#1a365d] focus:ring-[#1a365d] transition-all duration-200

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'Trophy', 'Users', 'Calendar', 'MapPin', 'CheckCircle', 'Shield' heavily.

structure: Hero Section: Full height, Navy gradient or Hero Image overlay. Big bold title. Two CTAs: 'Register Individual' (Primary) and 'Register Team' (Secondary).
Info Bento Grid: 4-cell grid showing Date (TBD), Location (Club Green Meadows), Price ($150/$600), and Format (4-person scramble).
About Section: Brief text about ILWU Local 4 and the event purpose.
Footer: Simple, dark navy, union contact info.
Split Layout: Left side is the form (clean, white background), Right side is a sticky image (Golf Action) with a quote or stat.
Form Steps: 1. Player Info, 2. Team Selection (Create or Join), 3. Confirmation.
Payment Notice: Prominent yellow alert box stating 'Payment collected at Credit Union or Hall'.
Dashboard Shell: Sidebar navigation (Teams, Players, Settings).
Stats Row: Total Players, Total Teams, Spots Remaining.
Data Table: Dense, sortable table of registrations. Status badges (Assigned/Unassigned).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on Navy background is White. Text on Yellow background must be Navy (not white).
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings using the Yellow brand color.
accessibility.labels: All form inputs must have visible labels.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Bootstrap' layouts. Use the 'Bento' grid principles.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give that 'Sport/Union' feel.
Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure the 'Payment' warning is visible but not alarming - use the Union Yellow for this notice.
